summary: Code review allows the CORE-248 corrective evidence-ref validation slice at head 812079a58ee0ec0fe81aec43dd0b393c332affd9. The implementation requires exact Harbor evidence_ref response matching and access_state=available before copying evidence_refs, and API self-checks cover invalid scene URL, malformed evidence lookup, mismatched evidence lookup, failed run status, and no copied evidence_refs. Hume's current-head carrier drift finding was addressed in the prior carrier commit by removing stale PR head text from status/progress and refreshing build-evidence head_at_validation to the review-prep carrier baseline. No App/Harbor/Lode code or real browser/account/profile/site action is included.
